subquestion: Take the date 07/15/2015 and modify it so that it is an instance of the concept "a date one month ago". Provide the modified date in the format MM/DD/YYYY.
judge_answer:
To determine the date one month ago from 07/15/2015, we need to subtract one month. 

July is the 7th month of the year, so subtracting one month from July would bring us to June, which is the 6th month of the year.

Since July 15th is the date we are starting with, and June has fewer days than July, we need to find the last day of June 2015 to determine how many days to subtract. June 2015 had 30 days.

To find the date one month ago from July 15th, we would subtract 15 days from June 30th. 

June 30th - 15 days = June 15th.

So, the correct date one month ago from 07/15/2015 is 06/15/2015, not 06/29/2015.

FINAL ANSWER: incorrect
